items.title: Coordinate with SMBC on Opti positioning for upcoming AD management meeting
items.context: Email from Ryo Ishii (SMBC) on May 16: 'I'd love to circle back as we prepare for the upcoming AD management meeting, especially to align on the key messages for Donna.' Rina shared detailed Opti differentiation notes to the SMBC team.

items.title: Review Prism Layer seed round pitch deck
items.context: Email from Simone Garreau (simone@prismlayer.ai) on May 15: 'Hi everyone--just finished our seed round pitch deck. Talk soon!' Deck attached as 'PL Pitch Deck v4'.

items.title: Prep for Prism Layer in-person meeting on May 26
items.context: Calendar event 'In-Person Meeting + Zoom | Simone Garreau (Prism Layer) + Fin Capital' on May 26 at Fin Capital offices with Logan, Jake, Derek, Claire, and Simone.

items.title: Follow up with Sai at Discern Security if no response to outreach
items.context: Email from Fan to Sai Venkataraman (sai@discernsecurity.com) on May 18: 'If you are open to a quick catch-up call, I would love to learn more about the latest developments.' Awaiting response.

items.title: Confirm Echelon AI founders scheduled virtual meeting with US Bank
items.context: Email from Meghan Kober (US Bank SVP) on May 14 after Fan intro'd Echelon: 'Please send over some dates and times that would work for you. Looking forward to connecting!' Addressed to Eddie and Rahul at Echelon.

items.title: Prep for GetReal & FinCapital Investor Briefing on May 20
items.context: Calendar event 'GetReal & FinCapital | Investor Briefing' on May 20 3-4pm ET with Matt Moynahan and team from GetReal Labs, plus Jake, Lissette, and Derek from Fin.

items.title: Prep for Security Breakfast planning call with Thoropass on May 21
items.context: Calendar event 'Security Breakfast Prep - Fin Capital & Thoropass' on May 21 with Lauren, Jackie, Derek, Jake, and Thoropass team (Claire Lamb, Javier Santin).
